Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: DECLARE @objectId AS NVARCHAR(20) DECLARE @DocEntry INT SET @objectId = {?ObjectId@} SET @DocEntry = {?DocKey@} DECLARE @table AS VARCHAR(20) SELECT @table = CASE @objectId WHEN '59' THEN 'OIGN' WHEN '60' THEN 'OIGE' END EXEC(' SELECT T0.DocEntry, T0.DocNum, T0.DocDate, T0.DocTime, T0.Comments FROM '+@table+' T0 WHERE T0.DocEntry = ' + @DocEntry)

Table.Name: Command
Table.Command: DECLARE @objectId AS NVARCHAR(20) DECLARE @DocEntry INT SET @objectId = {?ObjectId@} SET @DocEntry = {?DocKey@} DECLARE @table AS VARCHAR(20) SELECT @table = CASE @objectId WHEN '59' THEN 'IGN1' WHEN '60' THEN 'IGE1' END EXEC(' SELECT T0.BaseRef, T0.ItemCode, T0.Dscription, T0.Quantity, T0.unitMsr, T0.LineTotal, T0.Currency, T0.PriceBefDi FROM '+@table+' T0 WHERE T0.DocEntry = ' + @DocEntry)

FormulaFieldDefinitions.FormulaFieldDefinition:
switch ( {?ObjectId@} = 59, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Tilgang fra produktion', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Ontvangst uit productie', True, 'Receipt from production' //Default English ),
{?ObjectId@} = 60, switch( {@X_Language} = 'DK', 'Udlevering for produktion', {@X_Language} = 'DE', 'Afgifte voor productie', True, 'Issue for production' //Default English ), TRUE, 'UNKNOWN TYPE' )
